scripts.build: npm run build:ts && node-gyp configure build
scripts.build:wasm: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ rmSync }) => { rmSync('dist/libwz.js', { force: true }); rmSync('dist/libwz.wasm', { force: true }); rmSync('dist/wasm', { recursive: true, force: true }) })" && npm run build:ts && emcmake cmake -S . -B build/wasm -DBUILD_WASM=ON -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build/wasm
scripts.dev:wasm:vite: npm run build:ts && npm --prefix tests/wasm/vite run dev
scripts.dev:wasm:webpack: npm run build:ts && npm --prefix tests/wasm/webpack run dev
scripts.test:wasm:bundlers: npm --prefix tests/wasm/vite install --ignore-scripts --package-lock=false && npm --prefix tests/wasm/vite run build && npm --prefix tests/wasm/webpack install --ignore-scripts --package-lock=false && npm --prefix tests/wasm/webpack run build
scripts.test:wasm: npm run build:wasm && node tests/wasm/esm-import.test.mjs && node tests/wasm/direct.test.mjs && node tests/wasm/parity.test.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run build:ts && npm run build:wasm
scripts.test: npm run build:ts && npm run build:native && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
